title: NG2 3AA, D200 Energy Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/MP3337VZ/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit for:    Operator name: D200 Energy Limited   Installation name: D200 Energy Centre   Permit number: EPR/MP3337VZ/V005   "
